name: Influenza
description: Respiratory infection caused by influenza viruses

name: Migraine
description: Neurological condition characterized by intense headaches

name: Diabetes
description: Chronic condition that affects how your body uses blood sugar

name: Pneumonia
description: Infection that inflames air sacs in one or both lungs

name: Arthritis
description: Inflammation of one or more joints

name: Hypertension
description: Condition in which the force of the blood against the artery walls is too high

name: Asthma
description: Chronic respiratory condition that narrows the airways

name: Anemia
description: Condition in which you lack enough healthy red blood cells to carry adequate oxygen to your body

name: Bronchitis
description: Inflammation of the lining of your bronchial tubes

name: Gastritis
description: Inflammation of the lining of the stomach
